home.heroBody: We design contemporary typeface families for brands, editorial and screens. A small collection, built to last.
home.principle1Body: From hairline to black, every axis is drawn to render at display and text sizes without losing its voice.
home.principle2Body: Weights, widths and italics speak to each other. A family is a coherent mesh, not loose parts.
home.principle3Body: Careful hinting and metrics so text breathes at any pixel density.
home.tryBody: Try any typeface from the collection right in your browser — weight, size, spacing.
home.ctaBody: One license, every family, lifetime updates.

typefaces.title: The collection
typefaces.subtitle: Families designed and maintained by Grafema.

foundry.body: Grafema is an independent studio devoted to type design. We work slowly, on a few families a year, obsessed with detail.

journal.title: Journal
journal.subtitle: Notes on type, process and the craft.
